channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Top AI voice uses Claude Code to run her day
item.description: Allie K. Miller says your AI should already be working before you wake up.

item.title: After Trump shooting attempt, CEOs need new security playbook
item.description: Also: News and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: The middle manager's AI survival guide
item.description: Even before AI, middle management led to burnout; AI adds challenges and opportunities.

item.title: Fortune 500 CEO spring cleaning favors company veterans
item.description: CEO shakeup sweeping the Fortune 500 favors leaders built in-house.
